---
# ── REQUIRED ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
draft: true                          # Set false when ready to publish
title: "Post title"
description: "One-sentence summary shown in the listing and used for SEO."
date: 2026-01-01
date-modified: 2026-01-01           # Update when post is edited

# ── TAXONOMY ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Match existing filter-bar categories in blog.qmd to keep filters working.
# Active categories: Data, Field Work, Methods, Networks, SoLCA, South Asia,
#                    Tools, Workflow, Web, meta
categories: [Methods, Data]

# ── IMAGE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Thumbnail shown in the blog listing. Use one of the existing SVG assets,
# or add a real image to assets/images/ and reference it here.
# Options: img-network · img-scatter · img-timeseries · img-heatmap · img-sankey
image: ../assets/images/img-network.svg
---

<!-- ── OPENING ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  One short paragraph. Hook the reader with the concrete problem or question.
  Avoid throat-clearing; start with something specific.
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->

Opening paragraph here — one strong sentence or problem statement.

<!-- ── BODY ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Use ## headings for main sections. Write as you would for a colleague who
  knows the field but hasn't seen this specific analysis.
  Aim for 400–800 words total.
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->

## Section heading

Body text...

## Data and methods (if applicable)

Describe data sources, tools used, and any non-obvious analytical choices.

<!-- ── CALLOUT EXAMPLE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Callouts are stripped of Bootstrap styling and use the editorial palette.
  Types: note, tip, warning, caution, important
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->

::: {.callout-note}
A note or aside that adds context without interrupting the main thread.
:::

<!-- ── LINKS ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Close with 2–4 relevant links: related project, paper, dataset, or portfolio item.
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->

## Links

- [Related project or paper](../projects/project-name.html)
- [DOI](https://doi.org/...)
